ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Spinach (30%), Savoy Cabbage (30%), Parsnip (19%), Curly Kale (15%), Garlic Chilli Vegan Drops (6%) (Coconut Oil, Salt, Garlic, Red Chilli Pepper, Balsamic Vinegar [Wine Vinegar, Grape Must], Sugar, Spices, Dextrose, Onion, Lemongrass Extract, Cayenne Pepper, Black Pepper).
